name: HH Execution Detected
description: Detects the execution of hh.exe (Microsoft HTML Help Executable) with a .chm (Compiled HTML Help) file. While legitimate, adversaries may use hh.exe to execute malicious code embedded within .chm files. Review any alerts to differentiate legitimate help usage from potential abuse.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'hh.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the hh.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute hh.exe, including a .chm file.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which hh.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
